Wife will be fond of travelling:
If Venus has Moon in the 2•d or if Moon is posited in 2nd
degree to Venus and if no planets are posited in 4 or 5 signs from
Moon, she will be fond oftravelling. IfMoon is having an
interchange (parivarthana) with Venus, she will travel to a distant
place.
Wife is a dull headed one
If Venus combines with Mars & Ralm or if the Venus has
the combination of Mars, Jupiter in 5'h or 9th she will be of dull
headed and stubbornness.

48 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
Wife will be lover of Arts
In a horoscope, if Venus is combined with Mercury or if
there is a combination of Mercury & Moon she will have love for
Arts. lfthere is Venus +Mercury+ Moon combination and if
there is Jupiter's aspect p this from'5111or 9'11 she will progress in
Arts. When this combination exists the native will learn the Arts
very easily.
